name: Transcript Analysis
prompt:
You have two files to analyze:

1. seed/transcript.txt — A meeting transcript with multiple speakers, decisions, and action items.
2. seed/meeting.wav — A WAV audio file associated with the meeting.

Answer these 5 questions:

Q1: How many distinct speakers are in the transcript? (Give a number)
Q2: What major technical decision was made in the meeting? (Brief description)
Q3: What is the duration of the WAV file in seconds? (Read the WAV file headers using Python or shell tools to determine this — do NOT guess)
Q4: What is the sample rate of the WAV file in Hz? (Read from the WAV file headers)
Q5: How many action items are listed in the transcript? (Give a number)

Write your answers to workspace/answers.json as:
{
  "q1": <number>,
  "q2": "<decision description>",
  "q3": <duration in seconds>,
  "q4": <sample rate>,
  "q5": <number of action items>
}
